chinese_news.title: 曼联，要被卖了
chinese_news.summary:
图片来源：视觉中国

作者/余梦莹

报道/投资界PEdaily

史上最盛大世界杯正在上演。

48支球队、39天、104场比赛，总奖金飙升至8.71亿美元。梅西、C罗、莫德里奇“最后一舞”，哈兰德、姆巴佩、亚马尔崛起，诸神之战拉开帷幕。

赛场之外，一家老牌足球豪门却站在了十字路口——彭博社消息，掌控英超球队曼联超20年的格雷泽家族内部，近期正在讨论出售事宜。

绰号“红魔”，这是英格兰足球史上最富盛名的豪门。

chinese_news.title: 36氪研究院 | AI时代留学就业白皮书：中国留学生全球就业趋势与人才价值重塑
chinese_news.summary:
在AI浪潮重塑全球产业逻辑的当下，传统留学路径所依赖的学历溢价与信息差正在系统性失效，大量高薪专业的基础性任务面临被AI批量化替代的风险。70/80后家长遭遇教育投资回报率骤降，05后年轻一代则陷入人机协同时代“何以确立自身不可替代价值”的身份焦虑。面对旧共识瓦解、新航线未明的历史性分水岭，36氪研究院与新通教育联合发布《AI时代留学就业白皮书：中国留学生全球就业趋势与人才价值重塑》。白皮书基于新通三十年积累的百万级家庭服务数据及36氪研究院对2030年全球新兴产业集群的前瞻研判，倡导回归全生命周期的长期主义，为留学家庭提供一份客观、中立的未来就业生存指南。

从“向外破局”到“向内扎根”：中国留学生三十年心理变迁史

中国留学行业三十年，其底层逻辑是一部中产家庭的教育焦虑与价值观重塑史。留学意义经历了五个阶段的变迁——从生存驱动、打破信息垄断的拓荒破冰，到追逐名校光环的晋升通道，再到就业预期前置的工具理性内卷，继而转入风险规避与心理议题凸显的疫情重塑期，直至当下AI浪潮中意义感赤字、情感支撑成为刚需的新阶段。

飞向宇宙、浩瀚无垠

作者｜曹思颀

6 月 12 日，在 SpaceX 正式挂牌当天，马斯克选择前往得州的星舰基地，和数百名员工一起，远程敲响了纳斯达克的开市钟。

在现场，他用熟悉的那股自嘲范儿说：「如果当年有人告诉我会有今天，我大概率觉得那个人嗑嗨了。因为当时我自己都认为这家公司会黄。」

chinese_news.summary:

无论是在美国境内还是境外，就连Anthropic的外籍员工，全都不可用。

chinese_news.title: 36氪首发 | 核心材料成本降至进口材料五分之一，电致变色技术厂商获投，车规级产线建设中
chinese_news.summary:
硬氪获悉，中科电墨近日完成数千万元Pre-A轮融资，由西安龙鼎投资独家投资。本轮融资将主要用于车规级电致变色产线建设、核心材料研发迭代以及汽车领域市场拓展。

伴随新能源汽车向智能化、舒适化方向升级，汽车玻璃正从传统结构件逐步演变为集隔热、防晒、隐私保护和交互体验于一体的功能件。尤其是全景天幕快速普及后，调光玻璃开始成为车企提升产品差异化的重要配置之一。

目前市场主流调光技术主要包括PDLC（液晶调光）、SPD（悬浮粒子调光）以及EC（电致变色）三种路线。PDLC和SPD主要依靠光散射实现遮蔽效果，普遍存在雾度较高、隔热能力有限、驱动电压较高等问题。而电致变色技术则通过材料发生氧化还原反应，实现玻璃透光率变化，不仅能够实现连续调光，同时具备低雾度、低能耗以及隔绝红外热辐射等优势，被认为是下一代智能玻璃的重要技术路线之一。

中科电墨成立于2023年，专注于电致变色核心材料及器件研发。公司首席科学家马明明博士长期从事导电高分子材料研究，于2017年成功研发出相关核心材料体系。通过引入自主设计的导电聚合物材料，中科电墨突破了长期由海外

chinese_news.title: SpaceX 2万亿美元市值这一夜，回望中国商业航天十年冷暖
chinese_news.summary:
6月12日晚，SpaceX以史上最大估值完成IPO，股价冲高至176美元，截至目前市值已经突破2万亿美元。 马斯克成为历史上第一位万亿美元身价的富豪。

马斯克在得克萨斯“星际基地”（Starbase）敲钟

其实在SpaceX敲钟之前，大洋彼岸的行业水温早已接近沸腾。

过去半年，商业航天成为国内一级市场最热的赛道之一。投资人排队约见创始人，地方政府争抢项目落地，一些过去很少关注航天的基金，也开始研究火箭、卫星和星座。“头部项目现在整个市场有几

investment_theses.thesis: Bitcoin reprices higher through 2026 on institutional Mag8 adoption + geopolitical de-escalation (Iran deal), with 4-6 month horizon.

Kalshi/Polymarket volume on US-Iran deal signing will spike when Trump reiterates Sunday deadline, creating options-flow spillover to spot
investment_theses.counter_view: Iran deal rhetoric is recurring Trump pattern; actual signing delays (Iran denies exact timing per BBC); macro headwind if Fed stays hawkish into June FOMC; DXY strength if USD risk-on stalls.
investment_theses.expression: Long BTC spot/perpetuals; set stops at $58k; target $72k; hedge with short DXY (long-duration rate shock) or long TLT if peace falters

investment_theses.thesis: SpaceX (SPCXX) retests IPO highs ($176+) by August 2026 on sustained institutional demand + Tesla/Musk wealth-effect carry trade.
supporting_signals: TD Securities analyst expects 'bigger days ahead' (CNBC); first trading day moderated volatility = institutional digestion, not selling; 36Kr framing as $20T+ narrative (Chinese VC/wealth preservation play); SpaceX bitcoin reserve ($1.3B) creates dogleg demand if BTC rallies
Musk $1.11T net worth (BBC) now > Buffett 7x; wealth-effect spending/acquisition signals rising into 2026H2
investment_theses.counter_view: Valuation stretched (6x+ SpaceX revenue run rate); Starship execution delays; regulatory friction on space-debris/FCC licensing; Elon's attention fragmented (Tesla turnaround, X revenue focus).
investment_theses.expression: Long SPCXX equity; or synthetic long via call spread ($170 call / $185 call, August expiry); pair-trade short TSLA if Musk distraction thesis gains traction

investment_theses.thesis: Ethereum outperforms Bitcoin on 2026 institutional adoption (Wall Street pilots→production) and tokenization infrastructure (Ondo, Morpho $175M raise), 60-120 day horizon.
supporting_signals: Etherealize founder: 'Wall Street moving past pilots into Ethereum' (CoinDesk); Ondo tokenization mirrors $20T ETF boom; Morpho $175M raise signals DeFi infrastructure capital concentration; ETH futures bearish, but staker resilience points to bottom (Cointelegraph); Perpetual futures evolution (CoinDesk thesis) benefits Ethereum options/derivatives liquidity
Chinese news (36Kr) tracking Anthropic AI models—suggests global institutional AI settlement moving to Ethereum chains
investment_theses.counter_view: ETH futures flash bearish signal is real capitulation warning; Beacon Chain staking yield compression as base layer demand flattens; regulatory overhang on tokenized securities (SEC staking guidance); BTC maximalist adoption in Mag8 squeezes ETH allocation.
investment_theses.expression: Long ETH/USD perpetuals; long ETH call spreads (2500/2800, June/July); or long ETH/BTC ratio via synthetic (long ETH, short BTC weighted 0.065 target)

investment_theses.thesis: Stablecoin yields (USDC, USDT on Lido/Aave/Morpho) re-rate upward if Fed cuts rates in 2H 2026, creating arbitrage window vs. traditional money-market funds.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: 'Stablecoins meant to disrupt finance, became idle cash'—thesis is they re-activate if real rates drop; Morpho $175M raise targets exactly this (institutional stablecoin allocation); DXY strength today (May 5) = temporary headwind, but June FOMC pivot probable if inflation data softens
Saylor bitcoin-sales-for-credit thesis (Cointelegraph) signals MicroStrategy moving liquidity into yield products; macro convergence trade
investment_theses.counter_view: Fed stays restrictive; inflation sticky; stablecoin yield compression as AUM floods in; regulatory tightening on yield products (Anthropic export control precedent); bank deposits fight for similar custody business.
investment_theses.expression: Long USDC 6-month yields on Morpho/Aave (variable rate); hedge with short 2Y USDT futures if rates don't fall by August; or synthetic long via short DXY / long USDC swap spreads

investment_theses.thesis: AI-inference tokens (TAO, COAI) rally into H2 2026 as tokenization mirrors ETF boom and Anthropic model restrictions create settlement-layer arbitrage.
supporting_signals: Bittensor (TAO) + ChainOpera AI (COAI) both trending; Hacker News (RTX 5080/Qwen discussion, 162 score) signals inference compute commoditization; CoinDesk: 'Perpetual futures could become crypto's next ETF moment'—inference settlement tokens benefit from derivatives ecosystem maturity

36Kr + Hacker News coverage of Anthropic export controls (Amazon CEO triggered crackdown) suggests global AI model settlement migration to decentralized layers; Ondo $175M+ suggests institutional infrastructure already pricing this
investment_theses.counter_view: TAO/COAI highly speculative, low liquidity; OpenAI/Google dominance in inference = centralized moat; Anthropic restrictions are temporary policy, not structural shift; compute incentive networks are unproven at scale.
investment_theses.expression: Speculative long TAO 5-10% portfolio allocation; pair with short TAO/BTC ratio hedge; or long TAO call spreads (250/350, August) with tight stops at $180
